title: Patch Drift: Boss Garage
attractText: PATCH DRIFT: BOSS GARAGE — Glide your grease mechanic around the ring, grab flying scrap, and stack matching parts into repair towers before each rogue machine crushes the shop. Stick to drift. BUTTON 1: start / wrench toss / confirm. BUTTON 2: magnetic dodge. Build all 3 towers to win the duel.
html: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset='UTF-8'><meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0'><style>html,body{margin:0;background:#111;height:100%;overflow:hidden;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif}body{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}canvas{width:min(100vmin,960px);height:min(100vmin,960px);image-rendering:auto;display:block;background:#161616;box-shadow:0 0 30px #000}</style></head><body><canvas id='game' width='960' height='960'></canvas><script>(function(){const c=document.getElementById('game'),x=c.getContext('2d');const W=960,H=960,CX=480,CY=480;let state='title',t=0,last=0,score=0,stage=0,flash=0,msgT=0;const safe=90;const colors={bg:'#161616',grid:'#242424',metal:'#8fa3ad',warn:'#ff6b4a',good:'#7df58a',accent:'#ffd54f',cyan:'#79e0ff'};const input=()=>window.arcadeInput||{};let prevB1=false,prevB2=false,startLatch=false;let actx=null;function audio(){if(actx)return actx;try{actx=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();}catch(e){}return actx}function beep(f,d,type,v){const a=audio();if(!a)return;const o=a.createOscillator(),g=a.createGain();o.type=type||'square';o.frequency.value=f;g.gain.value=v||0.05;o.connect(g);g.connect(a.destination);const n=a.currentTime;o.start(n);g.gain.setValueAtTime(v||0.05,n);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,n+d);o.stop(n+d)}function noise(d,v){const a=audio();if(!a)return;const buf=a.createBuffer(1,a.sampleRate*d,a.sampleRate),data=buf.getChannelData(0);for(let i=0;i<data.length;i++)data[i]=(Math.random()*2-1)*(1-i/data.length);const s=a.createBufferSource(),g=a.createGain();s.buffer=buf;s.connect(g);g.connect(a.destination);g.gain.value=v||0.05;s.start()}const player={x:480,y:760,vx:0,vy:0,r:18,carry:null,dodge:0,hp:5,inv:0,face:0};let boss,parts,bullets,sparks,towers,waves;function resetStage(){player.x=480;player.y=760;player.vx=0;player.vy=0;player.carry=null;player.dodge=0;player.inv=0;player.face=0;parts=[];bullets=[];sparks=[];towers=[{x:290,y:790,type:0,need:4,have:0},{x:480,y:790,type:1,need:4,have:0},{x:670,y:790,type:2,need:4,have:0}];const names=['PRESS','COOL','SPARK'];boss={x:480,y:220,r:72,hp:12+stage*3,maxHp:12+stage*3,name:['RUST MAMMOTH','GRIND HIVE','OVERLORD LATHE'][stage]||'SCRAP TYRANT',phase:0,timer:0,shot:0,speed:1.4+stage*0.2,pattern:0};for(let i=0;i<8+stage*2;i++)spawnPart(Math.random()*3|0,true);waves=0;msgT=2.5}function spawnPart(type,initial){let ang=Math.random()*Math.PI*2,rad=initial?(220+Math.random()*170):(240+Math.random()*120);parts.push({x:CX+Math.cos(ang)*rad,y:CY+Math.sin(ang)*rad,vx:(Math.random()*2-1)*0.5,vy:(Math.random()*2-1)*0.5,type:type,r:14,glow:Math.random()*6.28})}function startGame(){audio()&&audio().resume&&audio().resume();stage=0;score=0;player.hp=5;resetStage();state='play';flash=0;beep(220,0.12,'sawtooth',0.08);beep(440,0.18,'square',0.05)}function nextStage(){stage++;if(stage>=3){state='win';beep(440,0.18,'triangle',0.07);setTimeout(()=>beep(660,0.2,'triangle',0.07),80);setTimeout(()=>beep(880,0.25,'triangle',0.07),160);return}resetStage();state='play';beep(520,0.14,'square',0.07)}function hitPlayer(){if(player.inv>0||player.dodge>0)return;player.hp--;player.inv=1.2;flash=0.5;noise(0.08,0.08);beep(90,0.2,'sawtooth',0.08);if(player.carry){parts.push({x:player.x,y:player.y,vx:(Math.random()*2-1)*2,vy:-2-Math.random()*2,type:player.carry,r:14,glow:0});player.carry=null}if(player.hp<=0){state='lose';msgT=0}}function wrenchThrow(){if(!player.carry)return; const dx=boss.x-player.x,dy=boss.y-player.y,d=Math.hypot(dx,dy)||1; bullets.push({x:player.x,y:player.y,vx:dx/d*7,vy:dy/d*7,r:8,good:true,type:player.carry,life:1.8}); player.carry=null; beep(380,0.09,'square',0.06)}function tryDeposit(){if(player.carry===null)return false; for(const tw of towers){if(Math.hypot(player.x-tw.x,player.y-tw.y)<46 && tw.type===player.carry && tw.have<tw.need){tw.have++; score+=50; player.carry=null; sparks.push({x:tw.x,y:tw.y,n:12,col:tw.type}); beep(220+tw.type*90,0.12,'triangle',0.07); if(towers.every(q=>q.have>=q.need)){boss.hp-=4; flash=0.25; msgT=1.5; for(let i=0;i<3;i++)spawnPart(i,false); beep(120,0.15,'sawtooth',0.08); setTimeout(()=>beep(80,0.2,'sawtooth',0.08),70); towers.forEach(q=>q.have=0); if(boss.hp<=0){score+=500; state='stageclear'; msgT=0.6}} return true;}} return false}function bossFireRing(n,speed){for(let i=0;i<n;i++){let a=i/n*Math.PI*2+boss.timer*0.5; bullets.push({x:boss.x,y:boss.y,vx:Math.cos(a)*speed,vy:Math.sin(a)*speed,r:11,good:false,life:6})}}function bossFireArc(n,aim,spread,speed){for(let i=0;i<n;i++){let a=aim+((i-(n-1)/2)*spread); bullets.push({x:boss.x,y:boss.y,vx:Math.cos(a)*speed,vy:Math.sin(a)*speed,r:12,good:false,life:6})}}function update(dt){t+=dt; const I=input(); const b1=!!I.button1, b2=!!I.button2, b1p=!!I.button1Pressed|| (b1&&!prevB1), b2p=!!I.button2Pressed||(b2&&!prevB2); prevB1=b1; prevB2=b2; if((state==='title'||state==='lose'||state==='win')&&b1p&&!startLatch){startLatch=true; startGame()} if(!b1)startLatch=false; if(state!=='play'&&state!=='stageclear')return; if(state==='stageclear'){msgT-=dt; if(msgT<=0)nextStage(); return} msgT=Math.max(0,msgT-dt); flash=Math.max(0,flash-dt); player.inv=Math.max(0,player.inv-dt); player.dodge=Math.max(0,player.dodge-dt); let ax=0,ay=0,acc=0.38,max=4.6,fr=0.985; if(I.left)ax-=acc;if(I.right)ax+=acc;if(I.up)ay-=acc;if(I.down)ay+=acc; if(player.dodge>0){max=7.8;fr=0.992;} player.vx+=ax; player.vy+=ay; let sp=Math.hypot(player.vx,player.vy); if(sp>max){player.vx=player.vx/sp*max; player.vy=player.vy/sp*max} player.vx*=fr; player.vy*=fr; player.x+=player.vx*60*dt; player.y+=player.vy*60*dt; if(sp>0.2)player.face=Math.atan2(player.vy,player.vx); const ringR=325; let dx=player.x-CX,dy=player.y-CY,d=Math.hypot(dx,dy)||1; if(d<145){player.x=CX+dx/d*145;player.y=CY+dy/d*145;player.vx*=0.7;player.vy*=0.7} if(player.x<safe){player.x=safe;player.vx*= -0.1} if(player.x>W-safe){player.x=W-safe;player.vx*= -0.1} if(player.y<260){player.y=260;player.vy*= -0.1} if(player.y>H-safe){player.y=H-safe;player.vy*= -0.1} if(b2p&&player.dodge<=0){player.dodge=0.38; const a=sp>0.3?Math.atan2(player.vy,player.vx):player.face; player.vx+=Math.cos(a)*6; player.vy+=Math.sin(a)*6; beep(700,0.06,'triangle',0.04)} if(b1p){if(!tryDeposit())wrenchThrow();} boss.timer+=dt; boss.shot-=dt; boss.x=CX+Math.sin(boss.timer*0.8+stage)*140; boss.y=210+Math.cos(boss.timer*0.55+stage)*40; if(boss.shot<=0){const aim=Math.atan2(player.y-boss.y,player.x-boss.x); if(stage===0){bossFireArc(5,aim,0.22,2.3); boss.shot=1.1}else if(stage===1){bossFireRing(10,2.0); boss.shot=1.35; if(Math.random()<0.6)bossFireArc(3,aim,0.3,3.1)}else{bossFireArc(7,aim,0.16,3.0); setTimeout(()=>{},0); bossFireRing(8,2.5); boss.shot=0.95} beep(140,0.05,'square',0.04)} for(const p of parts){p.glow+=dt*3; p.x+=p.vx*60*dt; p.y+=p.vy*60*dt; let dx=p.x-CX,dy=p.y-CY,dd=Math.hypot(dx,dy)||1; if(dd<170||dd>390){const nx=dx/dd,ny=dy/dd; p.vx-=nx*0.06; p.vy-=ny*0.06} p.vx*=0.996; p.vy*=0.996; if(player.carry===null && Math.hypot(player.x-p.x,player.y-p.y)<30){player.carry=p.type; p.dead=true; score+=10; beep(520+p.type*100,0.08,'triangle',0.05)}} parts=parts.filter(p=>!p.dead); while(parts.length<7+stage*2)spawnPart(Math.random()*3|0,false); for(const b of bullets){b.x+=b.vx*60*dt; b.y+=b.vy*60*dt; b.life-=dt; if(!b.good&&Math.hypot(player.x-b.x,player.y-b.y)<player.r+b.r){hitPlayer(); b.life=0} if(b.good&&Math.hypot(boss.x-b.x,boss.y-b.y)<boss.r+b.r){boss.hp-=1; score+=25; b.life=0; sparks.push({x:b.x,y:b.y,n:10,col:b.type}); beep(180+Math.random()*40,0.07,'sawtooth',0.06); if(boss.hp<=0){score+=500; state='stageclear'; msgT=0.6}}} bullets=bullets.filter(b=>b.life>0&&b.x>-40&&b.x<W+40&&b.y>-40&&b.y<H+40); for(const s of sparks){s.t=(s.t||0)+dt; if(!s.p){s.p=[]; for(let i=0;i<s.n;i++)s.p.push({a:Math.random()*6.28,v:1+Math.random()*4})}} sparks=sparks.filter(s=>(s.t||0)<0.4)} function drawPart(px,py,type,rot,scale){x.save();x.translate(px,py);x.rotate(rot||0);x.scale(scale||1,scale||1); const cols=['#ffcf4a','#79e0ff','#7df58a']; x.fillStyle=cols[type]; x.strokeStyle='#111'; x.lineWidth=3; if(type===0){x.fillRect(-12,-12,24,24);x.strokeRect(-12,-12,24,24);x.fillStyle='#111';x.fillRect(-3,-16,6,32)} else if(type===1){x.beginPath();x.arc(0,0,13,0,6.28);x.fill();x.stroke();x.fillStyle='#111';for(let i=0;i<6;i++){x.fillRect(-2,-18,4,8);x.rotate(1.047)}} else {x.beginPath();x.moveTo(-14,10);x.lineTo(0,-14);x.lineTo(14,10);x.closePath();x.fill();x.stroke();x.fillStyle='#111';x.fillRect(-3,6,6,10)} x.restore()} function draw(){x.fillStyle=flash>0?('#341a1a'):colors.bg; x.fillRect(0,0,W,H); for(let i=0;i<12;i++){x.strokeStyle=i%2?'#222':'#262626';x.lineWidth=2;x.beginPath();x.arc(CX,CY,150+i*28,0,6.28);x.stroke()} x.strokeStyle='#333';x.lineWidth=18;x.beginPath();x.arc(CX,CY,325,0,6.28);x.stroke(); x.fillStyle='#202020'; x.beginPath(); x.arc(CX,CY,145,0,6.28); x.fill(); if(state==='title'){x.fillStyle='#ffd54f';x.font='bold 82px Arial';x.textAlign='center';x.fillText('PATCH DRIFT',480,220);x.fillStyle='#79e0ff';x.font='bold 58px Arial';x.fillText('BOSS GARAGE',480,285); x.fillStyle='#8fa3ad';x.font='28px Arial';x.fillText('Glide the mechanic around the repair ring.',480,380);x.fillText('Collect scrap parts and stack matching towers.',480,420);x.fillText('When all 3 towers are built, the boss machine breaks down.',480,460); for(let i=0;i<3;i++)drawPart(360+i*120,560,i,t*0.6,1.5); x.fillStyle='#ff6b4a';x.font='bold 34px Arial';x.fillText('BUTTON 1  START / TOSS / STACK',480,685);x.fillText('BUTTON 2  MAGNETIC DODGE',480,730); x.fillStyle=(Math.sin(t*4)>0?'#fff':'#ffd54f');x.font='bold 42px Arial';x.fillText('PRESS BUTTON 1',480,840); return} towers.forEach((tw)=>{x.fillStyle='#2b2b2b';x.fillRect(tw.x-40,tw.y-50,80,100);x.strokeStyle='#555';x.lineWidth=4;x.strokeRect(tw.x-40,tw.y-50,80,100); for(let i=0;i<tw.need;i++){if(i<tw.have)drawPart(tw.x,tw.y+28-i*18,tw.type,0,1); else {x.strokeStyle='#444';x.strokeRect(tw.x-15,tw.y+18-i*18,30,14)}}}); parts.forEach(p=>drawPart(p.x,p.y,p.type,p.glow,1)); bullets.forEach(b=>{x.fillStyle=b.good?'#ffd54f':'#ff6b4a';x.beginPath();x.arc(b.x,b.y,b.r,0,6.28);x.fill()}); sparks.forEach(s=>{const cols=['#ffcf4a','#79e0ff','#7df58a']; x.strokeStyle=cols[s.col||0]; x.lineWidth=3; for(const p of s.p){const r=(s.t*120*p.v); x.beginPath(); x.moveTo(s.x+Math.cos(p.a)*r*0.4,s.y+Math.sin(p.a)*r*0.4); x.lineTo(s.x+Math.cos(p.a)*r,s.y+Math.sin(p.a)*r); x.stroke()}}); x.save(); x.translate(boss.x,boss.y); x.fillStyle='#6f7d86'; x.beginPath(); x.arc(0,0,boss.r,0,6.28); x.fill(); x.strokeStyle='#c9d4d9'; x.lineWidth=6; x.stroke(); x.rotate(t*0.8); for(let i=0;i<6;i++){x.rotate(1.047);x.fillStyle='#9aaab2';x.fillRect(-10,-boss.r-18,20,28)} x.fillStyle='#ff6b4a'; x.beginPath(); x.arc(-18,-8,10,0,6.28); x.arc(18,-8,10,0,6.28); x.fill(); x.restore(); x.save(); x.translate(player.x,player.y); x.rotate(player.face+Math.PI/2); x.globalAlpha=player.inv>0?(0.5+0.5*Math.sin(t*20)):1; x.fillStyle=player.dodge>0?'#79e0ff':'#ffd54f'; x.fillRect(-16,-18,32,36); x.fillStyle='#333'; x.fillRect(-8,-28,16,14); x.fillStyle='#111'; x.fillRect(-12,8,8,18); x.fillRect(4,8,8,18); x.fillStyle='#ff6b4a'; x.fillRect(10,-4,18,8); x.restore(); if(player.carry!==null)drawPart(player.x,player.y-34,player.carry,t*4,0.9); x.fillStyle='#fff'; x.textAlign='left'; x.font='bold 28px Arial'; x.fillText('HP',70,60); for(let i=0;i<player.hp;i++){x.fillStyle='#ff6b4a';x.fillRect(120+i*28,38,20,24)} x.fillStyle='#fff'; x.fillText('SCORE '+score,70,100); x.textAlign='center'; x.fillStyle='#ffd54f'; x.font='bold 28px Arial'; x.fillText(boss.name,480,58); x.strokeStyle='#444'; x.lineWidth=8; x.strokeRect(280,80,400,20); x.fillStyle='#ff6b4a'; x.fillRect(280,80,400*(boss.hp/boss.maxHp),20); if(msgT>0&&state==='play'){x.fillStyle='#79e0ff';x.font='bold 28px Arial';x.fillText('STACK ALL 3 TOWERS TO STUN THE BOSS',480,130)} if(state==='stageclear'){x.fillStyle='#7df58a';x.font='bold 70px Arial';x.textAlign='center';x.fillText('MACHINE DOWN!',480,470)} if(state==='lose'){x.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.45)';x.fillRect(0,0,W,H);x.fillStyle='#ff6b4a';x.font='bold 88px Arial';x.textAlign='center';x.fillText('SHOP WRECKED',480,420);x.fillStyle='#fff';x.font='36px Arial';x.fillText('Score '+score,480,500);x.fillText('Press Button 1 to retry',480,560)} if(state==='win'){x.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.45)';x.fillRect(0,0,W,H);x.fillStyle='#7df58a';x.font='bold 84px Arial';x.textAlign='center';x.fillText('GARAGE SAVED',480,390);x.fillStyle='#fff';x.font='38px Arial';x.fillText('Final Score '+score,480,470);x.fillText('Press Button 1 for a new shift',480,540)}} function loop(ts){const dt=Math.min(0.033,(ts-last)||0.016); last=ts; update(dt); draw(); requestAnimationFrame(loop)} requestAnimationFrame(loop);})();</script></body></html>
